mlPerQuery.source: 500ml per 10-50 responses; estimate from industry usage reports

referencePoints.label: Mid-sized data centre (daily)
referencePoints.description: ~300,000 litres per day for evaporative cooling

referencePoints.label: Hyperscale data centre (daily)
referencePoints.description: Up to 5 million gallons per day (18.9M litres) — for largest AI hyperscale facilities
referencePoints._note: 5 million US gallons = 18,927,059 litres. Source: POWER-summary.md 2024 US Data Center Energy Usage Report.

growthProjection._note: US on-site data center water use projected to grow 2–4x between 2023 and 2028. Source: 2024 US Data Center Energy Usage Report via POWER-summary.md.
